ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., Released, Pending) */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID referencing the category of the project */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the project */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Total budget allocated for the project */,
  "actual_cost" TEXT /* Actual cost incurred so far */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the project (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "client" INTEGER /* ID of the client */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the project was updated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the project */,
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_project_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Software Development, Template Creation) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categorization) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Project Manager, Developer) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged in */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project being updated */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the update was made */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the update */,
  "status_before" TEXT /* Status of the project before the update */,
  "status_after" TEXT /* Status of the project after the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_updates_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_updates_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the document belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path of the uploaded document */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the document */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the document was uploaded */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of the document (e.g., Specification, Design) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_milestones" (
  "milestone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each milestone */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project related to the milestone */,
  "milestone_description" TEXT /* Description of the milestone */,
  "milestone_date" TEXT /* Date by which the milestone is expected to be achieved */,
  "is_completed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the milestone is completed */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date when the milestone was completed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("milestone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_milestones_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the comment relates to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Content of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "is_private" INTEGER /* Indicates if the comment is private */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Project Manager, Developer) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON or comma-separated list of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project related to the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Notification message */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was created */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the notification has been read */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of the notification (e.g., Project Update, Comment Added) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project related to the history */,
  "status_change" TEXT /* Description of the status change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change occurred */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the status change */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the status change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_history_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_history_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
